networkStatus.offline: No internet connection. Your changes may not be saved.

errors.UNAUTHENTICATED: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission for this action.
errors.NOT_FOUND: We couldn't find what you're looking for.
errors.CONFLICT: This action conflicts with an existing record.
errors.VALIDATION_ERROR: Some fields are invalid. Please review them.
errors.INVALID_REFERENCE: The reference you provided doesn't exist.
errors.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Please try again shortly.
errors.INTERNAL_ERROR: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
errors.UNKNOWN_ERROR: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.MARKETPLACE_AUTH_FAILED: The marketplace rejected these credentials. Please verify and try again.
errors.MARKETPLACE_ACCESS_DENIED: Marketplace access blocked. Sandbox may require IP allowlisting.
errors.MARKETPLACE_UNREACHABLE: The marketplace is currently unreachable. Please try again in a few minutes.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

connect.title: Connect your store
connect.subtitle: Connect your seller account so we can compute orders and profit.

hints.credentials: You can find these in the Trendyol seller panel under Account → Integration Info.

errors.INVALID_NAME_TOO_SHORT: Store name must be at least 2 characters.
errors.INVALID_NAME_TOO_LONG: Store name can be at most 80 characters.
errors.INVALID_SUPPLIER_ID_FORMAT: Supplier ID can only contain letters and digits.
errors.INVALID_API_KEY_FORMAT: API Key / Secret format is invalid.
errors.SANDBOX_NOT_ALLOWED: Sandbox environment is not available in this deployment.
errors.PLATFORM_NOT_YET_AVAILABLE: This marketplace is not yet supported.
errors.DUPLICATE_STORE_CONNECTION: This Trendyol account is already connected.
errors.generic: We couldn't connect the store. Please try again.

metadata.title: PazarSync — E-commerce Profitability & Operations
metadata.description: Platform for Turkish marketplace sellers: per-order real profitability, automated settlement reconciliation, and expense management.

orgStoreSwitcher.emptyTitle: You don't belong to an organization yet
orgStoreSwitcher.emptyDescription: Create an organization or join via invitation to start using PazarSync.

toast.storeFlowNotReady: Connect-store flow is not ready yet

hero.subtitle: Connect your Trendyol and Hepsiburada stores. See every order's net profit in seconds — commissions, shipping, platform fees, and VAT broken out cleanly.

profit.title: Real per-order profit
profit.description: Commission, shipping, platform fees, and VAT itemized so you know what each order actually earned in seconds.

reconciliation.title: Automated reconciliation
reconciliation.description: Match payout reports, carrier invoices, and order data to answer the one question that matters: did the marketplace pay correctly?

expenses.title: Expense management
expenses.description: Product costs, ads, packaging — add every operational expense so your profit figure is honest, not optimistic.

errors.otp_expired: The verification link has expired. Please request a new one.
errors.auth-callback-missing-code: The verification link is incomplete. Please use the full link from the email.
errors.generic: We couldn't complete email verification. Please try again.

supabase.userAlreadyExists: This email address is already registered.
supabase.emailNotConfirmed: You haven't verified your email yet. Check your inbox.
supabase.otpExpired: Code expired. Request a new one.
supabase.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait and retry.
supabase.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

checkEmail.title: Check your email
checkEmail.body: We've sent you a link to confirm your account. Open your inbox (and spam folder) and click the link to sign in.

verified.title: Your email is verified
verified.body: Your PazarSync account is ready. Taking you to the dashboard.
verified.redirecting: Redirecting to the dashboard in {seconds} seconds…

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter the email address where we'll send the reset link.

sent.title: Email sent
sent.body: We've sent the reset link to your email. Check your inbox (and spam folder).

errors.generic: Couldn't send the email. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a strong password. You'll be signed in automatically.

invalidSession.title: Link invalid or expired
invalidSession.body: Request a new password-reset email and click the link to return to this page.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.generic: Couldn't update the password. Please try again.

signOut.error: Couldn't sign out. Please try again.

auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

panel.title: Organizations
panel.description: Organizations you are a member of.

create.title: New organization
create.subtitle: Create an organization for your business. You'll connect marketplace stores under this organization.
create.nameHint: This is an internal reference name. You can change it later.

toast.error: Couldn't create the organization. Please try again.

errors.INVALID_NAME_TOO_SHORT: Name must be at least 2 characters.
errors.INVALID_NAME_TOO_LONG: Name must be at most 80 characters.
errors.INVALID_NAME_NO_ALPHANUMERIC: Name must contain at least one letter or digit.
errors.INVALID_NAME_RESERVED: This name is reserved. Please choose another.
errors.generic: Couldn't create the organization. Please try again.

active.title: Active organization
active.description: The dashboard and data are scoped to this organization.

createOrganization.title: Let's get started
createOrganization.subtitle: Create your first organization to begin using PazarSync. You'll manage marketplace stores, orders, and expenses under this organization.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong.
errorBoundary.description: An unexpected error occurred. Try again, or go home.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for may have moved or been deleted.

empty.title: Dashboard content under planning
empty.description: Store summary and period controls are ready in the rail. Detailed reports will populate this area later.

placeholderPage.description: This page is still under development. It will be active in upcoming updates.

empty.title: Notification center coming soon
empty.description: Sync events, new order notifications, and alert history will appear here.
